title: Workhorse Stock Forecast and Price Prediction Analysis
text: Workhorse Group's stock price is forecasted to decline. The stock has experienced significant negative performance with a -77.78% decline in 2023, -90.33% decline in 2024, and -90.53% decline in 2025. The stock lost about 65% since October 31, 2025 due to Q3 2025 earnings disappointment, with quarterly revenue of $2.38 million falling below analysts' expectations. Analyst sentiment is mixed with 0 Buy Ratings, 10 Hold Ratings, and 0 Sell Ratings. Workhorse Group has approximately 92.31% upside potential based on analysts' average price target. The overall technical rating for WKHS is Sell, with a downtrend starting from November 25, 2025. Multiple factors have impacted investor sentiment including the delivery of fewer trucks, rise in inventory excess reserves, and a 1-for-12 reverse stock split implemented in early December 2025.
